BreakEvenAnalysis.Context: Quick back-of-napkin after Frank Donovan floated a Church Hill lease bump at renewal. Pulling it together before the last-Monday P&L review with Megan and Devon.

CurrentState.Note: Rough estimate only. Need to firm up the food-cost line with Devon once the season's actuals are closed.

Scenario_A_RentTo750.Label: Rent increases to $3,450/mo if Frank passes the tax bump through
Scenario_A_RentTo750.BreakEvenCalculation: Monthly costs $36,130 + $250 increase = $36,380. At a $21 average check, $36,380 / $21 = 1,732.4 → 1,733 covers minimum.
Scenario_A_RentTo750.Impact: Manageable. Well within reach at roughly 2,000 covers a month.

Scenario_B_RentTo850.Label: Worst case - rent to $3,800/mo (Frank says this is the ceiling at renewal)
Scenario_B_RentTo850.Impact: Tighter but survivable. Frank hinted this is the top of what he'd ask. Strengthens the case for buying the building.

BreakEvenAnalysis.KeyInsight: Break-even is ~1,730-1,750 covers a month at current pricing. At roughly 2,000 covers we have real headroom. The bigger question is whether to keep absorbing rent hikes or move on buying the building from Frank Donovan.
ActionItems: Get Frank Donovan's renewal number in writing before the lease conversation
Revisit with Devon and Megan at the last-Monday P&L review once the season's actuals are in
